creator: sascha.kinz@heagmobilo.de
text:
Ok this ist strange. Maybe the version information was not updated?

# ./check_icmp -V
check_icmp v (nagios-plugins 2.3.3)

So I deleted and reinstalled the Port.

# portversion -v | grep nagios-plugins
[Reading data from pkg(8) ... - 393 packages found - done]
nagios-plugins-2.4.3,1      =  up-to-date with port

But still get this:

# ./check_icmp -V
check_icmp v (nagios-plugins 2.3.3)
